name: Thai Bread- Regular Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and yeast in a large bowl.
2. Add flour, sugar, salt, butter, chili paste, lime juice, peanuts, coconut milk, sesame seed oil, lemon zest, and cilantro to the wet ingredients.
3. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated into a dough.
4. Follow your bread machine manufacturer's instructions for adding ingredients and baking.
5. Makes a 1 pound loaf.
